ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is a premium 4-bedroom villa boasting a highly desirable direct lake view and situated on one of the largest plots (9,760 sqft) in its actual location. Area Metric Confusion: The 9,760 sqft figure likely represents the plot size, not the Built-Up Area (BUA). Standard 4-bedroom villas in Jumeirah Park typically have a BUA of 3,500 to 4,300 sqft. If BUA is used, the actual price per sqft is significantly higher than the stated AED 1,634.

Overpricing Risk: At AED 15,950,000, this is at the absolute ceiling for Jumeirah Park 4-bedroom villas, even with a large plot and lake view. The investment yield (ROI) will be compressed compared to standard Jumeirah Park assets.

It is marketed using Emirates Hills' premium market metrics to make a Jumeirah Park property look heavily discounted (AED 1,634/sqft vs AED 2,936/sqft median). In reality, AED 15.95M is an ultra-premium price for Jumeirah Park. Expect lower rental yields due to the high capital entry point, making this more of an end-user trophy home than a high-yielding investment.

Priced at AED 1,546 per sqft, the property sits at a massive ~32% discount to the Dubai Marina market median of AED 2,278 per sqft. risk_flags: Building Age & CapEx: Completed in 2006, the building may require higher maintenance fees, and the unit itself may need significant capital expenditure (renovation) to command premium market rents.

ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property is a classic 'value-add' defensive play. The steep 32% discount to the market median provides a strong safety margin and downside protection. While the building's age limits rapid capital appreciation, the combination of immediate rental income, a spacious layout, and the rare asset of two parking spaces ensures high rental liquidity and strong net yields. ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is located in Radiant Marina Towers, Shams Abu Dhabi on Al Reem Island—a highly sought-after waterfront community known for premium infrastructure and solid rental yields. While marketed as a 'Junior-Bedroom' with a 'Splendid Sea View,' the listed size of 1,756 sqft is exceptionally large for this typology, where junior 1-beds typically average 500 to 700 sqft. This suggests the unit either features an extraordinarily large private terrace or represents a data entry error by the broker.
risk_flags: Typology and Size Mismatch: A 1,756 sqft size for a 'Junior-Bedroom' (typically smaller than a standard 1-bed) is highly anomalous and suggests a listing error.

Pricing Discrepancy: The listed price of AED 1,156/sqft is 32% below the stated market median of AED 1,705/sqft. If the sqft is artificially inflated by outdoor terrace space or is simply incorrect, the perceived discount is misleading.
Geographic/Market Misalignment: The property is located in Abu Dhabi (Al Reem Island), which operates under a different regulatory framework (ADJD/Muncipality) and market dynamic than Dubai.
Potential Bait-and-Switch: Extremely low price-per-sqft listings for premium views in new towers often turn out to be unavailable 'hook' listings to generate leads.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: On paper, this property presents an incredibly low entry point on a price-per-sqft basis (AED 1,156 vs. AED 1,705 market median) for a waterfront asset in Shams Abu Dhabi. However, as a Dubai-based analyst, I flag this as a high-probability data error. A junior 1-bedroom will not command the rental income of a typical 1,700+ sqft unit (which would normally be a 2 or 3-bedroom). Investors must verify the exact net internal area versus outdoor terrace area, as well as the physical layout, before committing. If the livable area is standard and the rest is terrace, the yield will be heavily compressed relative to the total purchase price.

title: Spacious | Canal and Burj Views | Tenanted
description:
Hamilton Residency 1 Bedroom Apartment for Sale | Business Bay

Tenanted until january 15th/ 2027

Experience modern city living in this elegant 1 bedroom apartment at Hamilton

ai_analysis.quality_context: Hamilton Residency is an established, mid-tier residential development by Deyaar in Business Bay. While the building is older (completed circa 2011) compared to the luxury off-plan and newly handed-over projects driving the area's median price to AED 2,229/sqft, this unit offers a highly generous layout of 869 sqft. The premium Canal and Burj views add strong intrinsic value, though the building's overall aesthetic and amenities are modest compared to newer neighboring towers.
risk_flags: Severely restricted liquidity and exit strategy due to the long-term tenancy active until January 15, 2027, which deters end-user buyers who dominate the current purchasing market.
Potential rental yield compression if the current tenant is locked into historical rates well below the current market peak, with limited rent increase potential under RERA regulations.
Higher maintenance fees and potential capital expenditure risks associated with an older building structure and aging communal facilities.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: Priced at AED 1,554 per sqft—a massive ~30% discount to the Business Bay median of AED 2,229—this property represents an excellent entry-level value play for patient, yield-focused investors. The spacious 1-bedroom layout and highly desirable Burj/Canal views safeguard its long-term rental demand. However, because it is tenanted until 2027, this asset is unsuitable for short-term capital flips or immediate occupancy, making a thorough audit of the current lease agreement and net ROI essential before acquisition.

title: GREAT INVESTMENT | Spacious Layout
description:
Luxury 1 Bedroom Duplex | Business Bay | High ROI Investment

Experience elevated city living in this elegant fully furnished 1 bedroom duplex apartment located in the prestigious Marquise

ai_analysis.quality_context: This property is a spacious 1-bedroom duplex located in Marquise Square, Business Bay. At 1,182 sqft, its footprint is significantly larger than the average Business Bay 1-bedroom apartment (typically 750 to 900 sqft). Priced at AED 1,565 per sqft, it sits at a substantial ~30% discount relative to the Business Bay market median of AED 2,229 per sqft. This pricing indicates strong value, particularly for a fully furnished duplex configuration which usually commands a premium.
risk_flags: The large size (1,182 sqft) for a 1-bedroom unit drives up the absolute purchase price (approx. AED 1.85M), which may limit the exit liquidity as typical 1-bed buyers look for lower absolute ticket sizes.

Duplex layouts inherently feature structural 'dead space' (such as staircases and double-height ceilings) which inflates the billable sqft and subsequent service charges without offering usable floor area.

The steep discount to the market median (AED 1,565 vs. AED 2,229) suggests potential underlying factors such as a less desirable view, proximity to construction noise, or a highly motivated seller requiring a quick cash exit.
Service charges in Business Bay are relatively high; a larger sqft footprint will directly impact net yields if service fees are charged on total area.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This unit presents a highly lucrative opportunity for investors targeting the high-yield short-term rental (holiday home) market. The unique duplex layout and full furnishing make it highly attractive to premium corporate tenants and tourists in Business Bay. Acquiring this asset at a 30% discount to the area's median sqft price provides a strong safety margin and excellent capital appreciation potential as the Business Bay micro-market continues to mature. Under professional short-term management, this property has the potential to generate a net ROI of 7.5% to 8.5%.

title: Best Priced | Motivated Seller | VOT
description:
Type 3M | Prime Location | Vacant on Transfer

- Springs 6
- Type 3M
- Back to Back
- 3 Bedrooms
- Study
- Standard Model
- Vacant on Transfer
- Renovation

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is listed under 'Emirates Hills' but is actually a Type 3M townhouse located in 'Springs 6' (within the broader Emirates Living master development). While Emirates Hills proper consists of ultra-luxury bespoke mansions, The Springs is a mature, mid-to-high-end gated community. The Type 3M layout (3 Bedrooms + Study) is one of the most popular and liquid townhouse layouts in Dubai for young families. The description notes 'Standard Model | Renovation', indicating the villa is likely in its original Emaar handover condition from the mid-2000s and requires cosmetic or structural modernization.
risk_flags: Misleading Market Comparison: The property is compared against the 'Emirates Hills' market median of 2,673 AED/sqft to imply a massive discount. In reality, 1,876 AED/sqft is actually at the higher end of the market for an unrenovated townhouse in The Springs.

High Capital Expenditure (CapEx): As a 'Standard Model' needing 'Renovation', the buyer must budget an additional 150,000 to 300,000 AED for upgrading MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing), bathrooms, kitchen, and flooring to make it competitive.

Sub-optimal Plot Location: 'Back to Back' units face the rear of another property, offering less privacy and lower premium potential compared to single-row, lake-facing, or park-facing units in the community.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property is marketed with a false sense of discount by leveraging Emirates Hills data. At 1,876 AED/sqft for an unrenovated Springs 3M, the entry price is high once renovation costs are factored in. However, the 'Vacant on Transfer' (VOT) status is highly valuable in Dubai's current landlord-heavy market, allowing an end-user to move in immediately or an investor to renovate and lease at premium market rates without tenant eviction delays. It is a solid long-term hold for yield post-renovation, but offers limited immediate capital appreciation headroom at this purchase price.

title: Upgraded | Furnished | Low Floor | Prime Location
description: Betterhomes proudly presents you this stunning 2 Bedroom apartment in MAG 218.Experience modern Marina living in this meticulously upgraded,  fully furnished 2-bedroom apartment in MAG 218 Tower.

ai_analysis.quality_context: MAG 218 is a well-regarded, established residential tower in the northern district of Dubai Marina. At 1,723 sqft, this 2-bedroom unit is exceptionally spacious compared to the contemporary Marina average of 1,100 to 1,300 sqft. The 'upgraded' and 'fully furnished' status is a significant value-add, offsetting the building's age (completed circa 2010) and making it immediately rentable or ready for short-term holiday home conversion without requiring immediate capital expenditure.
risk_flags: Low floor positioning likely results in limited views (potentially blocked by neighboring high-rises) and increased exposure to street-level and tram noise.
The building is over a decade old, which may entail higher annual service charges and potential wear-and-tear on common area infrastructure.
A ~30% discount to the market median (AED 1,335 vs AED 1,895/sqft) is highly pronounced and may indicate a sitting tenant under an active, below-market lease, or a highly motivated seller.
The large square footage inflates the absolute purchase price, which might dilute the net rental yield if local rental rates do not scale proportionally with the extra space.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property represents a highly attractive value-add investment opportunity, priced at a massive 29.5% discount to the Dubai Marina median price per sqft. The combination of a fully upgraded interior, complete furnishing, and a prime Marina location positions it well for high-yield short-term rentals or premium long-term leasing. Investors should conduct due diligence on the current tenancy status, outstanding service charges, and exact view obstructions to confirm net yield projections, but on a capital appreciation and price-per-sqft basis, this is a highly competitive entry point into the Marina market.

title: Multiple Units | Elegantly Furnished | Vacant
raw_area: Park Tower B, Park Towers, DIFC, Dubai
description:
DOM9 Properties is pleased to present this beautifully appointed 1-bedroom apartment in Park Towers B, DIFC, offering a compelling opportunity for both end users and savvy investors seeking long-term value in Dubai’s most prestigious financial district.

Spanning 881 sq. ft., this well-proportioned residence features a generous open-plan layout designed to maximize space, functionality, and natural light. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame attractive skyline views, creating a bright and inviting living environment ideal for modern urban living. The apartment is complemented by a fully fitted kitchen with appliances, built-in wardrobes, and high-quality finishes throughout, all maintained in excellent condition.

Located in the heart of DIFC — the leading financial center of Dubai and a globally recognized business hub — this property benefits from consistent demand driven by multinational corporations, financial institutions, and senior executives. DIFC’s recent major expansion announcement further reinforces its position as a global economic powerhouse, unlocking new commercial, residential, and lifestyle developments that are expected to drive strong capital appreciation and rental growth in the surrounding area.

This apartment presents an outstanding investment opportunity, suitable for short-term leasing, long-term rentals, or owner occupation with excellent future resale potential. Proximity to Gate Avenue, Downtown Dubai, Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, and major transport links ensures sustained tenant demand and liquidity.

Whether you are looking to secure a high-performing DIFC asset, diversify your property portfolio, or acquire a premium city home in a blue-chip location, this Park Towers residence offers the perfect balance of lifestyle, yield, and future value.

Contact DOM9 Properties today to arrange a private viewing.

Spanning 742.38 sq.ft, the apartment is thoughtfully designed with contemporary interiors, spacious living areas, and floor-to-ceiling windows that maximize natural light and create a seamless connection to the vibrant marina surroundings. Marina Views forms part of the iconic Rashid Yachts & Marina master development, where Riviera-inspired elegance meets Dubai’s dynamic urban lifestyle. Residents will enjoy a wide range of premium amenities including swimming pools, fitness facilities, waterfront relaxation areas, and easy access to Dubai’s key landmarks. Perfectly positioned, the development offers excellent connectivity with Downtown Dubai just 10 minutes away and Dubai International Airport reachable within 15 minutes.

title: LUXURY 3BR + MAID | LARGE LAYOUT | WATER LIVING
description:
Step into elevated waterfront living with this expansive 3-bedroom + maid’s apartment at Maravéa Residences by Enzo, ideally located in Dubai Islands—one of Dubai’s most promising coastal destinations. Designed as a boutique development with only 63 residences, this project offers exclusivity, privacy, and a refined island lifestyle 

Spanning approximately 2,033  this residence offers a generous and well-balanced layout, ideal for families and discerning buyers. The spacious living and dining area is designed with open-plan elegance, seamlessly connecting to large wraparound balconies.

The apartment features three well-proportioned bedrooms, including a master suite with walk-in wardrobe and en-suite bathroom, ensuring both comfort and privacy. A separate maid’s room adds practicality, while multiple bathrooms and a dedicated laundry area enhance functionality for everyday living.

The contemporary kitchen is fully fitted with high-quality finishes and integrated cabinetry, designed to complement the modern aesthetic of the home. Large windows throughout the residence allow natural light to flow in, creating a bright and inviting atmosphere 

Residents benefit from a curated selection of amenities across multiple levels, including an infinity pool, rooftop lounges, gym, yoga and meditation zones, cinema, co-working spaces, BBQ areas, landscaped gardens, and more 

Strategically located, the project offers seamless connectivity—just minutes from Dubai Islands Beach and Mall, 15 minutes to Dubai International Airport and DIFC, and within easy reach of Downtown Dubai 

Property Details:

• 3 Bedrooms + Maid’s Room
• Total Area: approx. 2,033 
• Large Wraparound Balconies
• Open-plan Living & Dining
• Premium Finishes & Modern Kitchen

Price: AED 5,651,000

Payment Plan: 50/50

title: Fully Furnished |High Floor |Golf N Canal Views
description:
Spacious 1-Bedroom | Fully Furnished | High Floor | Stunning Golf & Canal Views

Discover elevated living in one of Dubai Sports City’s most prestigious residential towers. This exceptionally spacious 1-bedroom apartment offers a rare combination of size, comfort, and breathtaking views, making it an ideal home or investment opportunity.

Situated on a high floor, the apartment features expansive interiors with a well-designed layout, abundant natural light, and premium furnishings throughout. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame spectacular panoramic views of the lush golf course and tranquil canal, creating a serene setting above the city. The apartment has been thoughtfully upgraded and is fully furnished with quality appliances including a fridge,TV and microwave, making it completely move-in ready. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame spectacular panoramic views of the lush golf course and tranquil canal, creating a serene setting above the city.

Property Highlights:

Huge 1-bedroom apartment with generous living spaces
Fully furnished and move-in ready
Size-1164 sqft
High-floor unit with uninterrupted golf course and canal views
Bright open-plan living and dining area
Modern kitchen with quality fittings and appliances
Spacious bedroom with built-in wardrobes
Located in one of the premium towers in Dubai Sports City
Excellent amenities including pool, gym, dry Sauna,Steam Room,new Jacuzzi,24/7 security, and covered parking

Perfect for end-users seeking a refined lifestyle or investors looking for a high-demand property in a thriving community. Enjoy the convenience of nearby retail, dining, sports facilities, and easy access to major highways.

A rare opportunity to own a standout apartment in one of Dubai Sports City’s most sought-after addresses.

title: SPACIOUS 2BR + STUDY | LARGE BALCONY | MODERN
description:
Step into a refined lifestyle with this spacious 2-bedroom + study apartment at Maravéa Residences by Enzo, located in the heart of Dubai Islands—Dubai’s next-generation waterfront destination. Designed as a boutique development with only 63 residences, the project offers privacy, elegance, and a serene coastal living experience

This well-designed apartment spans approximately 1,221  featuring a generous layout that includes two comfortable bedrooms, a dedicated study room, and a bright open-plan living and dining area. The space flows seamlessly onto a large private balcony, perfect for enjoying peaceful community and park views.

Both bedrooms are thoughtfully designed with built-in wardrobes and en-suite bathrooms, offering comfort and privacy. The additional study provides flexibility as a home office or extra functional space. The modern kitchen is fully fitted with high-quality cabinetry and contemporary finishes, blending style with practicality.

Residents benefit from a full lifestyle offering across multiple levels, including an infinity pool, rooftop lounge, gym, yoga and meditation zones, cinema, co-working spaces, BBQ areas, landscaped gardens, and more

Ideally located, the project is just minutes from Dubai Islands Beach and Mall, 15 minutes to Dubai International Airport and DIFC, and within easy reach of Downtown Dubai

Property Details:
• 2 Bedrooms + Study
• Total Area: approx. 1,221 
• Large Balcony
• Open-plan Living & Dining
• Modern Kitchen & Premium Finishes

Price: AED 2,510,000

Payment Plan: 50/50
• 50% during construction
• 50% on handover

Handover: Q4 2028

An excellent opportunity for both end-users and investors seeking space, functionality, and long-term value in a fast-growing waterfront community.

description: Experience the perfect blend of comfort and convenience in this elegantly designed 1 bedroom, 2 bathroom apartment located in the Central Park Residential Tower. This unfurnished, 1274 sq ft unit offers a contemporary living space ideal for singles or couples looking to enjoy modern city living. Situated in a prime area, this completed residential building provides an array of amenities to enhance your lifestyle. Central air conditioning ensures equal cooling throughout, while the pet-friendly environment allows you to bring your furry friends along. Enjoy a refreshing swim in the large shared pool designed for entertainment and relaxation, or stay fit in the shared gym equipped with the latest equipment. A welcoming hall for receiving guests greets you in the building, offering an elegant first impression. The unit boasts a stunning view of the city's famous landmarks, providing a serene and picturesque backdrop to your daily life. Safety and security are paramount with 24/7 concierge service and dedicated security ensuring your peace of mind. The location is perfect, with a dedicated play area for children featuring safe equipment, making it an ideal choice for families. The central A/C system ensures equal cooling throughout the unit, while the children’s pool offers a shallow, fun water area specifically designed for little ones. This property is close to essential facilities, including Salma Al-Ansariah School, Anatomy Physical Medicine And Rehabilitation Center, and Bay Avenue Mosque, ensuring that everything you need is just a short distance away. Don’t miss this opportunity to own a slice of modern, comfortable living in the heart of Dubai.

description:
Premium one-bedroom waterfront apartment for sale in DAMAC Bay Tower B by Cavalli, located at EMAAR Beachfront. The home features luxury interiors designed by Roberto Cavalli and is marketed below the original price level as stated. Handover is expected in Q2 2027 and the unit is offered on a payment plan.

The apartment includes a huge private balcony accessible from both the bedroom and the living room, creating a strong indoor-to-outdoor lifestyle feel. Floor-to-ceiling panoramic windows enhance natural light and the open sea atmosphere. The kitchen is equipped, and the layout includes one en-suite bathroom plus a separate powder room for guest convenience.

DAMAC Bay by Cavalli is designed as a resort-style beachfront address with private beach access, three infinity pools, a water fountain feature, a rooftop opera pavilion, and the Cavalli Lounge, creating a hotel-like leisure routine with a strong branded identity.

The development leans into a maritime luxury theme, combining wave-inspired architecture with nautical interiors by Cavalli. The tower concept is positioned around sea-view living and a dramatic skyline presence at EMAAR Beachfront.

Interested in this property?

Community Description & Facilities:

DAMAC Hills is one of Dubai’s most recognized master-planned residential communities, offering a blend of luxury living, green landscapes, and a family-oriented lifestyle. Developed by DAMAC Properties, the community is located in Dubai Land and has become a popular choice for both residents and investors seeking a balance between tranquility and urban connectivity.

DAMAC Hills represents a modern approach to suburban living in Dubai. It combines luxury housing with extensive green spaces, world-class amenities, and a family-friendly environment. Whether it’s the golf course views, the abundance of recreational facilities, or the peaceful atmosphere, the community offers a distinctive lifestyle that sets it apart from many other developments in the city. While it may not suit those seeking a fast-paced urban experience, it is an excellent choice for individuals and families looking for comfort, space, and a high-quality living environment in Dubai.

Armada Tower 3 is situated in the lively JLT conveniently placed within close proximity of key landmarks in Dubai such as Dubai Marina, The Palm and JBR Beach. JLT offers a range of benefits to residents such as a wide range of restaurants, transport links and directly off Sheikh Zayed Road. Also a high-rise building in Jumeirah Lake Towers, a mixed-use development best known for its beautiful man-made lakes and manicured gardens. The residential building is a part of the Armada Towers complex and is located in Cluster P, JLT.

Tower 3 developed by Armada Group has 36 floors above ground and three floors below ground along with retail options on the ground level. The residential building stands 493 sq. ft. tall. The high-rise is designed by Adnan Saffarini. Its construction started in 2005 and was completed in 2009.

Limestone House is strategically located in the heart of the Dubai International Financial Center. Direct access to the DIFC gate avenue affords residents the convenience and connectivity to enjoy all that DIFC has to offer. The building is popular with the working professionals in the area, who are within walking distance of their offices. The building also benefits from direct access to the Ritz Carlton hotel, which includes several restaurants and coffee shops. Residents also benefit from a discount scheme for the hotel. Limestone House excludes grandeur and privacy, where, as a resident you will experience direct access to your property from a single use lift.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

Located in the heart of Dubai South, the property benefits from ongoing infrastructure development and increasing demand driven by the expansion of Al Maktoum International Airport, Expo City Dubai, and the wider commercial and logistics hub surrounding the area. Designed for those who demand excellence, every corner of this home reflects premium craftsmanship, curated aesthetics, and a branded lifestyle unlike any other in the city.

Betterhomes is delighted to offer you this luxurious One Bedroom Apartment for sale in prestigious Sparkle Tower 3, Dubai Marina. 

One of Dubai Marina's most iconic residential developments, Sparkle Towers is a twin-tower complex created in partnership with renowned Austrian crystal brand Swarovski and completed in 2020. The towers are connected by a podium and feature a stunning façade illuminated by over 1,700 lights and adorned with Swarovski crystal accents, creating a brilliant, jewel-like glow at night. 

Residents enjoy an impressive selection of amenities, including a fully equipped fitness center, spa, temperature-controlled swimming pools, separate saunas and Jacuzzis for men and women, and an exclusive residents' lounge. Discover refined waterfront living with this elegant 1-bedroom apartment in LIA by Avenew, located in the heart of Dubai Islands, where the serenity of the Arabian Gulf meets the vibrancy of a contemporary marina. Designed with balance, light, and functionality in mind, this residence reflects a modern coastal lifestyle shaped by nature and architectural precision.

The apartment offers a total area of 831 sq. ft. with a well-proportioned layout featuring an open-plan living and dining area seamlessly connected to a modern kitchen. The bedroom is complemented by a walk-in closet and an en-suite master bathroom, while a separate powder room and dedicated laundry space enhance everyday convenience. Floor-to-ceiling windows allow natural light to flow throughout, opening onto a private balcony ideal for relaxation.

LIA is a boutique G+8 residential building comprising only 81 exclusive residences, crafted with flowing architectural lines, tiered balconies, and lush greenery. Residents enjoy world-class amenities including a podium-level infinity pool, pool bar, fully equipped gym, lounge deck, BBQ areas, kids’ play zone, and a grand triple-height lobby designed as a serene arrival experience.

Strategically positioned, Dubai Islands offers a unique balance of tranquility and accessibility, with easy connections to Downtown Dubai, Dubai International Airport, retail, dining, and leisure destinations.

Price: AED 2,000,000

Payment Plan:
10% down payment + 4% DLD
10% after 1 month
10% June 2026
5% December 2026
10% June 2027
5% December 2027
50% on completion

Anticipated completion: Q1 2028

An ideal opportunity for both end-users and investors seeking understated luxury by the sea.

Limestone House is strategically located in the heart of the Dubai International Financial Center. Direct access to the DIFC gate avenue affords residents the convenience and connectivity to enjoy all that DIFC has to offer. The building is popular with the working professionals in the area, who are within walking distance of their offices. The building also benefits from direct access to the Ritz Carlton hotel, which includes several restaurants and coffee shops. Residents also benefit from a discount scheme for the hotel. Limestone House excludes grandeur and privacy, where, as a resident you will experience direct access to your property from a single use lift.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

title: EXCLUSIVE WATERFRONT LIVING | PRIME LOCATION
raw_area: Hado by Beyond Tower B, Hado by Beyond, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Introducing this exceptional 3-bedroom residence at HADO by Beyond, offering a rare chance to own a spacious, sea-facing family home within one of Dubai Islands’ most design-forward waterfront communities.

Spanning an impressive 2318 sqft, this beautifully planned apartment delivers a harmonious balance of scale, comfort, and refined living. The residence features expansive living and dining areas complemented by floor-to-ceiling glazing, allowing uninterrupted sea and villa community views to flood the home with natural light. Each bedroom is generously proportioned to ensure privacy and comfort, while the master suite enjoys a tranquil outlook paired with premium finishes. A dedicated maid’s room and powder room enhance everyday practicality, making the home ideally suited for end users and long-term residents.

Inspired by Japanese minimalism, HADO residences are thoughtfully designed around balance, serenity, and timeless sophistication. Natural materials, soft neutral palettes, and clean architectural lines come together to create an atmosphere of understated luxury that is both contemporary and enduring.

Residents benefit from a comprehensive collection of resort-style amenities, including landscaped zen gardens, swimming pools, wellness spa, yoga studio, state-of-the-art fitness facilities, children’s play areas, social lounges, and curated retail offerings, all surrounded by lush greenery and located just moments from the beach.

The development features a highly attractive 50/50 payment plan:

10% on booking

10% one month from booking

30% during construction

50% on completion

With completion anticipated in Q3 2029, this structure offers flexible cash flow and strong long-term value for both investors and owner-occupiers.


Price: AED 7,781,000
Size: 2318 sqft
View: Sea & Villa Community

Limited availability. Contact now to secure one of the best-priced 3-bedroom residences in this landmark waterfront development.

description:
Experience refined coastal living in this exquisite 3-bedroom residence at Treppan Serenique, located in the exclusive Marina District of Dubai Islands. Designed for those who appreciate space, privacy, and uninterrupted sea views, this elegant apartment combines modern luxury with the tranquility of island life.

Offering a total area of 1,831.54 , the layout features a spacious open-plan living and dining area, beautifully connected to a sleek kitchen with high-end finishes and integrated appliances. Floor-to-ceiling windows flood the space with natural light and open onto three private balconies, each offering different vantage points of the surrounding sea, resort-style landscapes, and the peaceful island horizon.

All three bedrooms are generously sized and fitted with built-in wardrobes, with the master suite enjoying access to a dedicated balcony and spa-inspired ensuite. A separate powder room, a maid’s room, and a dedicated store room add exceptional functionality to the home.

As a resident of Treppan Serenique, you’ll enjoy:

 Infinity-edge pool overlooking the sea Wellness center and fitness studio Private beach access Concierge, valet, and 24/7 security Kids’ play areas and lush landscaped gardens 
Perfectly positioned near world-class hotels, dining, and the upcoming Wynn Casino, this address blends serene waterfront living with urban convenience.

raw_area: Soulever by Beyond Tower 1, Soulever by Beyond, Maritime City, Dubai
description:
Soulever by Beyond rises as Dubai Maritime City’s newest architectural landmark—two sculptural towers shaped by the sea, designed with precision, and infused with tranquility. Developed by Beyond Developments under the Omniyat Group, Soulever reflects Dubai’s maritime heritage through fluid forms, warm natural textures, and panoramic views of the Forest, the Cove, and the vibrant city skyline.

This 1-bedroom residence spans 855  offering a refined and efficient layout that blends living, dining, and balcony spaces with effortless flow. Floor-to-ceiling windows draw in natural light, opening your home to serene Forest and Cove views. Thoughtfully crafted interiors, a stylish powder room, and elevated ceiling heights create a sense of openness and calm—perfect for modern urban living.

Residents enjoy a suite of world-class amenities, including a heated infinity pool overlooking the sea, a cutting-edge fitness center, yoga and wellness studios, spa facilities, a private library, residents lounge, event and co-working spaces, a dedicated kids’ area, and a lush landscaped podium with cafés and boutique retail.

Just 5 minutes from Mina Rashid and 15 minutes from Downtown Dubai, Soulever offers the ideal blend of waterfront serenity and city convenience—an exceptional lifestyle destination and a prime investment opportunity.

Price: AED 2,800,000
Size: 855 
View: Forest / Cove
Developer: Beyond Developments (Omniyat Group)

With access to the flanked paradise of 450 meters of white sand sandy beaches, lined with its leisure promenade available at service. The environment around the community is very surprising and attractive where you can spend the very best life with the people you love within a community like this. Live the seaside dream at this destination that is vibrant by day and enchanting by the night, as well as the place offers gleaming white yachts. Wake up every day with the sunrise over the bay filled with attractions and leisure areas.

If you would like more information, please contact our Senior Client Advisor Mevand Wassel.

title: Stunning Beachfront Apartment on Palm Jumeirah
raw_area: Orla by Omniyat, The Crescent, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai
description:
This spectacular four bedroom apartment is positioned within the highly prestigious Orla by Omniyat — managed by Dorchester Collection — on the Palm’s Crescent.

Crafted by Foster + Partners with a vision to establish a strong and seamless connection between the indoors and outdoors, it spans 8,010 sq.ft. and presents exceptionally tasteful interiors.

The living area comes as the apartment’s social and entertainment core. Double-height ceilings enhance the sense of scale and light, with the full-height glazing framing framing views of the Palm and the Arabian sea. Just outside, a vast balcony offers the perfect al fresco space with unbeatable vistas and the comfort of a private swimming pool.

Sleek and well-appointed with top-tier European appliances, the show kitchen is supported by a closed preparation kitchen — making for an elaborate culinary setup. Each bedroom is ensuite, and served by generous balconies.

The home also benefits from a maid’s room, an office, and four parking spaces, alongside Orla’s world-class facilities. Stationed minutes from Atlantis the Palm and Atlantis The Royal, its setting places prime lifestyle, entertainment and dining destinations at the doorstep.

Palm Jumeirah stands as an iconic address worldwide. Well connected to Dubai’s key thoroughfares, it places coveted destinations including The View at The Palm, Palm West Beach, Club Vista Mare, and Palm Jumeirah Mall at a convenient distance.

Reach out to us to know more about this exquisite home.

raw_area: Soulever by Beyond Tower 1, Soulever by Beyond, Maritime City, Dubai
description:
Where coastal calm meets urban pulse.
Soulever by Beyond is Dubai Maritime City’s new architectural icon – two sculptural towers rising above the sea, blending natural serenity with refined design. Developed by Beyond Developments under Omniyat Group, Soulever captures Dubai’s maritime legacy through elegant architecture and breathtaking panoramas of the Cove, the Forest, and the city skyline.

This 2-bedroom residence spans 1,469 and offers a graceful layout connecting living, dining, and balcony spaces in harmony. Expansive windows flood the interiors with daylight and soothing marina views. The home features a powder room, refined finishes, and generous ceiling heights that create an airy sense of calm – perfect for both leisure and family life.

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including a heated infinity pool, state-of-the-art gym, yoga and wellness areas, spa, library, residents lounge, event space, kids play area, and a beautifully landscaped podium park with cafés and retail avenues.

Perfectly positioned just 5 minutes from Mina Rashid and 15 minutes from Downtown Dubai, Soulever offers the perfect balance between vibrant city life and tranquil beachfront living.

Price: AED 5,311,000
Size: 1469 sqft 
View: Ocean Cove 
Developer: Beyond Developments (Omniyat Group)

Interested in this 2-bedroom or want to explore other Soulever residences? Get in touch today to discover exclusive investment opportunities in Dubai Maritime City.

raw_area: Treppan Serenique Residences, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Discover an elevated lifestyle in this elegant 2-bedroom residence at Treppan Serenique, nestled within the prestigious Dubai Islands. With its serene coastal setting and refined architectural design, this residence offers an exceptional blend of comfort, privacy, and sophistication — ideal for both end-users and savvy investors seeking long-term value.

Spanning 989.17 , the apartment welcomes you into a spacious open-plan layout where contemporary design meets thoughtful functionality. The sunlit living and dining area flows seamlessly into a sleek modern kitchen, fully fitted with premium appliances and high-end finishes. Floor-to-ceiling glass doors lead to your private balcony, where you can unwind while taking in soothing sea views — a daily reminder that you’ve arrived somewhere special.

Both bedrooms are generously sized, with full-height wardrobes and carefully curated finishes that reflect Treppan’s commitment to luxury living. The master suite features its own tranquil outlook and access to a modern bathroom, while the secondary bedroom is ideal for guests, family, or a private study. 

As part of Treppan Serenique, residents enjoy access to a curated collection of resort-style amenities:

 Infinity pool overlooking the Arabian Gulf State-of-the-art gym and wellness center Concierge and valet services Private beach access Kids’ play area 24/7 security and smart access controls 
Located within the vibrant Marina District of Dubai Islands, the community is designed for waterfront living with direct access to upcoming luxury hotels, retail promenades, and cultural attractions — all just minutes from Downtown Dubai and DXB International Airport.

Price: AED 2,853,000

Interested in this 2-bedroom residence or want to explore more options? Get in touch today to discover refined coastal living at Treppan Serenique, Dubai Islands.

title: PRIVATE BEACH | WATERFRONT LIVING | 50/50 PP
raw_area: Hado by Beyond Tower B, Hado by Beyond, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Introducing a rare opportunity to own a premium waterfront residence at HADO by Beyond, offering exceptional value within the prestigious Dubai Islands.

This beautifully designed 2-bedroom apartment spans 1,236 sq ft and delivers a perfect balance of space, natural light, and everyday comfort. The open-plan living and dining area is enhanced by floor-to-ceiling windows, capturing serene sea and villa community views and creating a bright, tranquil atmosphere. Both bedrooms are generously sized, ensuring privacy and relaxation, while a dedicated laundry room adds practical convenience to the home.

HADO is a thoughtfully curated, design-led waterfront development inspired by Japanese principles of harmony, balance, and simplicity. The interiors feature refined natural materials, soft neutral palettes, and clean architectural lines, resulting in a timeless and sophisticated coastal living experience.

Residents enjoy access to a comprehensive suite of resort-style amenities, including landscaped zen gardens, swimming pools, a fully equipped fitness studio, yoga and wellness spa, children’s play areas, social lounges, and curated retail spaces — all surrounded by lush greenery and just moments from the beach.

The project offers a highly attractive and investor-friendly 50/50 payment plan:

10% on booking

10% one month from booking

30% during construction

50% on completion

Handover is scheduled for Q3 2029, providing flexibility and strong long-term growth potential.

Strategically positioned on Dubai Islands, HADO ensures seamless connectivity to Downtown Dubai, DIFC, and Dubai International Airport, while preserving the exclusivity and tranquility of island living.

Price: AED 3,911,000
Size: 1,236 sq ft
View: Sea & Villa Community

With limited availability of 2-bedroom units at this price point, this represents one of the best-value offerings in a landmark waterfront development. Enquire today to secure this exceptional residence.

title: THE DORCHESTER COLLECTION | 30/70 PAYMENT PLAN
raw_area: Vela Viento By Omniyat, Business Bay, Dubai
description:
Step into a new dimension of waterfront luxury with this exceptional 2-bedroom + study residence at VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection, located in the heart of Marasi Bay. Developed by OMNIYAT and managed by the world-renowned Dorchester Collection, this project redefines elevated living through design, service, and exclusivity .

Spanning an impressive 3,920 sqft, this residence is designed to maximize space, light, and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The layout features a spacious open-plan living and dining area, complemented by a show kitchen and a separate back-of-house kitchen.

The residence offers two generously sized bedrooms, including a luxurious master suite with a walk-in dressing area and an elegant en-suite bathroom. A dedicated study adds flexibility for a home office or additional private space, while a maid’s room, laundry area, powder room, and private lift lobby enhance both comfort and privacy.

One of the defining features of this home is its expansive wraparound terraces, extending the living space outdoors and offering breathtaking views of the Burj Khalifa and Dubai Canal . These terraces create a perfect setting for entertaining, relaxation, and enjoying Dubai’s skyline in complete privacy.

VELA Viento is designed by Foster + Partners with interiors by Gilles & Boissier, blending architectural excellence with refined Parisian elegance. Residents enjoy a curated lifestyle with world-class amenities and Dorchester Collection’s legendary services, including concierge, valet, and bespoke hospitality offerings .

Located within Marasi Bay, the project connects seamlessly to Downtown Dubai, DIFC, and Dubai Canal, placing residents at the center of a vibrant waterfront destination.

Price: AED 24,700,000
Size: 3,920 sqft
Handover: Q4 2027
Payment Plan: 30/70
Fully Furnished

Interested in this unit or want to learn more? Get in touch today to explore investment opportunities in VELA Viento – Dorchester Collection, Marasi Bay.
